pricing.refundPolicy: No fee refund on challenge fees.

payouts.schedule: Bi-weekly (14 days after account inception or 14 days after previous withdrawal). Flex accounts require 3 separate trading days with at least 0.5% profit each within 14-day period to be eligible.

rules.consistencyRule: 30-50% rule (best trade cannot exceed 30-50% of total profit, varies by program)
rules.notes: Stock and ETF prop firm only — no futures, options, forex, crypto, or CFDs. Spot-style stock trading. Four one-step programmes: Day Flex (2% daily pause, 4% max loss, unlimited days, 50% consistency), Day Max (1% daily pause, 3% max loss, 60 days, 30% consistency), Swing Flex (3% daily pause, 7% max loss, unlimited days, 50% consistency), Swing Max (3% daily pause, 7% max loss, 100 days, 30% consistency). Evaluation accounts are simulated. Funded accounts may be live and/or simulated depending on risk management decisions. 12,000+ stocks and ETFs in regular trading; 24/5 overnight session via Blue Ocean covers ~3,500 symbols. Day accounts: at 15:50 ET active and pending orders are liquidated, but after 16:00 ET traders can open new overnight positions subject to reduced overnight buying power. Swing accounts allow full overnight and weekend holding. News trading is allowed; the restriction is on scheduled earnings reports for overnight positions, where trades can be liquidated or tickers disabled. Copy trading allowed under strict limits: maximum 2 of your own accounts, TraderEvolution copy feature on evaluation accounts only, manual copy trading on both evaluation and funded accounts. Not allowed between different traders. Automated trading restricted in evaluation; SignalStack being trialled in beta for funded accounts. Minimum 30-second hold per trade. Minimum 10-cent movement for profitable trades — dashboard rounding can make borderline trades look valid when they are not. Volume cap: opening trades cannot exceed 5% of the previous one-minute candle volume for that instrument, or the most recent one-minute candle with volume if the prior minute had none. Minimum withdrawal $300 (general) or $150 ($5K funded accounts). Flex funded accounts need 3 separate trading days with at least 0.5% profit each within a 14-day period to be eligible for withdrawal; Max accounts do not have this rule. Payouts via wire transfer, crypto, Hub credits, or credit card. Funded scaling: after reaching 10% validated profit based on buying power, buying power increases by 5% and daily pause increases by 10% at each scale step. TraderEvolution desktop does not support Mac; web terminal and iOS app are available. Operated by Five Percent Online Ltd (The 5%ers).

markets.instruments: US Stocks and ETFs (12,000+ symbols via NASDAQ, NYSE, CBOE in regular trading; ~3,500 symbols via Blue Ocean for 24/5 overnight session). No futures, options, forex, crypto, or CFDs.
